positive: A minimalist and whimsical silhouette of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a tangle of glowing, abstract trees and bioluminescent flora, forming a dense, harmonious composition. Integrate abstract elements like crescent moons, nebulous cosmic dust, and floating crystalline islands into the canopy. Style should be neo-art nouveau and highly detailed, with clean, sharp linework and high contrast. Color direction: Deep indigo, glowing emerald green, sapphire blue, and accents of soft gold. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed for apparel printing. Cinematic, vector art, flat design aesthetic, highly graphic, seamless repeat potential. Studio lighting, volumetric glow, octane render, --ar 1:1
